steps.title: Identify the proven solution
steps.content: Hincapié identifies the core problem: young adults lack knowledge about startup practical details. His key finding is the solution that works—providing informational resources “significantly alleviates this problem.”

steps.title: Match the solution to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C — Providing young adults with practical information about how to start a business directly addresses what Hincapié identified as a proven solution.

The other choices describe approaches not part of his research—social networks, brainstorming ideas, and training at other businesses.

That is the correct answer.
